body_text:
FYI â July 2023
FYI â July 2023
The following updates were made to the Payment Solutions Manual.
Document Library
Status
CPS Admin Appointment Certificate
1918
We updated for the forwarding instructions for Manitoba and Alberta credit unions. Credit unions in these provinces should forward the completed form directly to Central 1 as an attachment to a ServiceNow ticket or via email instead of to their provincial central.
Saskatchewan credit unions were already instructed to forward completed CPS Admin Modification/ Deletion Request forms to Central 1.
We also made other minor editorial changes.
Revised
CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request
2035
We updated for the forwarding instructions for Manitoba and Alberta credit unions. Credit unions in these provinces should forward the completed form directly to Central 1 as an attachment to a ServiceNow ticket or via email instead of to their provincial central.
Saskatchewan credit unions were already instructed to forward completed CPS Admin Modification/ Deletion Request forms to Central 1.
We also made other minor editorial changes.
Revised
Direct Services for Business â Financial Institution Administrator Creation / Change / Deletion Request
2169
We updated for the forwarding instructions for Saskatchewan, Manitoba, and Alberta Credit Unions. Credit Unions in these provinces should forward the completed form (along with the appropriate CPS Admin form) directly to Central 1 as an attachment to a ServiceNow ticket or via email instead of to their provincial central.
We also changed references to the secure site to the Client Centre and Credit Union to Financial Institution where appropriate.
Revised
FTP User Request
2010
We updated for the forwarding instructions for Saskatchewan, Manitoba, and Alberta Credit Unions. Credit Unions in these provinces should forward the completed form (along with the appropriate CPS Admin form) directly to Central 1 as an attachment to a ServiceNow ticket or via email instead of to their provincial central.
We also changed references to the secure site to the Client Centre and Credit Union to Financial Institution where appropriate.
Revised
